title: Stalker
tagline: Let your weakness melt into the room.
synopsis: A guide leads two men into a forbidden Zone where a mysterious room is said to grant their deepest wishes.
directorNotes: Tarkovsky turns speculative fiction into a slow cinema pilgrimage about belief, doubt, and inner ruin.

title: Solaris
tagline: The planet has a mind of its own.
synopsis: A psychologist travels to a space station orbiting Solaris, where the crew is haunted by physical manifestations of memory.
directorNotes: Tarkovsky treats the cosmos as a reflective surface for memory, grief, and spiritual exhaustion.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
synopsis: A painter is commissioned to secretly create a wedding portrait, only to fall in love with her subject.
directorNotes: Sciamma builds longing through glances, absence of score, and the ethics of looking.

title: Chungking Express
tagline: What a difference a day makes.
synopsis: Two lovelorn Hong Kong policemen drift through overlapping stories of chance encounters, missed timing, and urban desire.
directorNotes: Wong captures transience through step-printing, pop repetition, and dense city textures.

title: Memoria
synopsis: A woman in Colombia becomes consumed by a mysterious sonic boom that only she seems driven to investigate.
directorNotes: Apichatpong links sound, memory, and landscape through patient observation and ruptures in perception.

title: The Conversation
tagline: Harry Caul is an invader of privacy. The best in the business.
synopsis: A surveillance expert becomes haunted by the moral consequences of a recording job that may lead to murder.
directorNotes: Coppola narrows paranoia to one fragile point of view and lets sound design carry the dread.
